member.name: T:ResponseStatus
member.summary:
Returned in {@link TransactionReceipt} = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.}, {@link PrecheckStatusException} and {@link ReceiptStatusException}.

The success variant is {@link #SUCCESS} which is what a {@link TransactionReceipt} will contain for a successful transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_2
member.summary: The transaction passed the precheck validations.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_3
member.summary: For any error not handled by specific error codes listed below.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_4
member.summary: Payer account does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_5
member.summary: Node Account provided does not match the node account of the node the transaction was submitted to.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_6
member.summary: Pre-Check error when TransactionValidStart + transactionValidDuration is less than current consensus time.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_7
member.summary: Transaction start time is greater than current consensus time

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_8
member.summary: The given transactionValidDuration was either non-Positive = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Positive, or greater than the maximum valid TimeSpan.From 180 secs.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_9
member.summary: The transaction signature is not valid

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.seconds(receipt)
member.summary: Transaction memo size exceeded 100 bytes

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.seconds(receipt)_2
member.summary: The fee provided in the transaction is insufficient for this type of transaction

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.seconds(receipt)_3
member.summary: The payer account has insufficient cryptocurrency to pay the transaction fee

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_10
member.summary: This transaction ID is a duplicate of one that was submitted to this node or reached consensus in the last 180 seconds (receipt period)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_11
member.summary: If API is throttled out

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_12
member.summary: The API is not currently supported

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_13
member.summary: The file id is invalid or does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_14
member.summary: The account id is invalid or does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_15
member.summary: The contract id is invalid or does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_16
member.summary: Transaction id is not valid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_17
member.summary: Receipt for given transaction id does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_18
member.summary: Record for given transaction id does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_19
member.summary: The solidity id is invalid or entity with this solidity id does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_20
member.summary: The responding node has submitted the transaction to the network. Its final status is still unknown.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_21
member.summary: The transaction succeeded

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_22
member.summary: There was a system error and the transaction failed because of invalid request parameters.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_23
member.summary: There was a system error while performing fee Calculation = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Calculation, reserved for future.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_24
member.summary: There was a system error while performing balance Checks = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Checks, reserved for future.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_25
member.summary: Key not provided in the transaction body

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_26
member.summary: Unsupported algorithm/encoding used for keys in the transaction

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.execution(query)
member.summary: When the account balance is not sufficient for the transfer

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.execution(query)_2
member.summary: During an update transaction when the system is not able to find the Users Solidity address

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.execution(query)_3
member.summary: Not enough gas was supplied to execute transaction

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.execution(query)_4
member.summary: contract byte code size is over the limit

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ve(amount)
member.summary: local execution (query) is requested for a function which changes state

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ve(amount)_2
member.summary: Contract REVERT OPCODE executed

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ve(amount)_3
member.summary: For any contract execution related error not handled by specific error codes listed above.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_27
member.summary: In Query Validation = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Validation, account with +ve(amount) value should be Receiving node Account = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Account, the receiver account should be only one account in the list

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_28
member.summary: Header is missing in Query request

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_29
member.summary: The update of the account failed

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_30
member.summary: Provided key encoding was not supported by the system

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_31
member.summary: null solidity address

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_32
member.summary: update of the contract failed

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_33
member.summary: the query header is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_34
member.summary: Invalid fee submitted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_35
member.summary: Payer signature is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_36
member.summary: The keys were not provided in the request.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_37
member.summary: Expiration time provided in the transaction was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_38
member.summary: WriteAccess Control Keys are not provided for the file

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.key(base ed25519,Keylist,or)
member.summary: The contents of file are provided as empty.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.key(base ed25519,Keylist,or)_2
member.summary: The crypto transfer credit and debit do not sum equal to 0

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.key(base ed25519,Keylist,or)_3
member.summary: Transaction body provided is empty

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.key(base ed25519,Keylist,or)_4
member.summary: Invalid transaction body provided

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.key(Keylist,or)
member.summary: the type of key (base ed25519 Key = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Key, Keylist = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Keylist, or ThresholdKey) does not match the type of signature (base ed25519 Signature = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Signature, Signaturelist = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Signaturelist, or ThresholdKeySignature)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_39
member.summary: the number of key (Keylist = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Keylist, or ThresholdKey) does not match that of signature (Signaturelist = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Signaturelist, or ThresholdKeySignature). e.g. if a keyList has 3 base Keys = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Keys, then the corresponding signatureList should also have 3 base signatures.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_40
member.summary: the livehash body is empty

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_41
member.summary: the livehash data is missing

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_42
member.summary: the keys for a livehash are missing

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_43
member.summary: the livehash data is not the output of a SHA-384 digest

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_44
member.summary: the query body is empty

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_45
member.summary: the crypto livehash query is empty

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_46
member.summary: the livehash is not present

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_47
member.summary: the account id passed has not yet been created.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_48
member.summary: the livehash already exists for a given account

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_49
member.summary: File WACL keys are invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_50
member.summary: Serialization failure

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_51
member.summary: The size of the Transaction is greater than transactionMaxBytes

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_52
member.summary: The Transaction has more than 50 levels

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_53
member.summary: Contract is marked as deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_54
member.summary: the platform node is either disconnected or lagging behind.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_55
member.summary: one public key matches more than one prefixes on the signature map

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_56
member.summary: transaction not created by platform due to large backlog

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_57
member.summary: auto renewal period is not a positive number of seconds

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_58
member.summary: the response code when a smart contract id is passed for a crypto API request

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_59
member.summary: the account has been marked as deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_60
member.summary: the file has been marked as deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_61
member.summary: same accounts repeated in the transfer account list

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_62
member.summary: attempting to set negative balance value for crypto account

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.modify(update or delete a immutable smart,i.e. one created without a /// admin)
member.summary: when deleting smart contract that has crypto balance either transfer account or transfer smart contract is required

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.modify(update or delete a immutable smart,i.e. one created without a /// admin)_2
member.summary: when deleting smart contract that has crypto balance you can not use the same contract id as transferContractId as the one being deleted

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.modify(update or delete a immutable smart,i.e. one created without a /// admin)_3
member.summary: transferAccountId or transferContractId specified for contract delete does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_63
member.summary: attempting to modify (update or delete a immutable smart Contract = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Contract, i.e. one created without a admin key)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_64
member.summary: Unexpected exception thrown by file system functions

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_65
member.summary: the duration is not a subset of [MinimumAutorenewDuration = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.MinimumAutorenewDuration,MAXIMUMAUTORENEWDURATION]

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_66
member.summary: Decoding the smart contract binary to a byte array failed. Check that the input is a valid hex string.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_67
member.summary: File to create a smart contract was of length zero

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_68
member.summary: Bytecode for smart contract is of length zero

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_69
member.summary: Attempt to set negative initial balance

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_70
member.summary: Attempt to set negative receive record threshold

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_71
member.summary: Attempt to set negative send record threshold

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.accounts(both from and)
member.summary: Special Account Operations should be performed by only Genesis Account = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Account, return this code if it is not Genesis Account

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.accounts(both from and)_2
member.summary: The fee payer account doesn't have permission to submit such Transaction

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.accounts(both from and)_3
member.summary: FreezeTransactionBody is invalid

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.accounts(both from and)_4
member.summary: FreezeTransactionBody does not exist

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(account 0.0.)
member.summary: Exceeded the number of accounts (both from and to) allowed for crypto transfer list

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(account 0.0.)_2
member.summary: Smart contract result size greater than specified maxResultSize

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_72
member.summary: The payer account is not a special account(account 0.0.55)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_73
member.summary: Negative gas was offered in smart contract call

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_74
member.summary: Negative value / initial balance was specified in a smart contract call / create

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_75
member.summary: Failed to update fee file

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_76
member.summary: Failed to update exchange rate file

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_77
member.summary: Payment tendered for contract local call cannot cover both the fee and the gas

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_78
member.summary: Entities with Entity ID below 1000 are not allowed to be deleted

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.valid(append or update is)
member.summary: Violating one of these rules: 1) treasury account can update all entities below 0.0.1000 = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.1000, 2) account 0.0.50 can update all entities from 0.0.51 - 0.0.80 = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.80, 3) Network Function Master Account A/c 0.0.50 - Update all Network Function accounts and perform all the Network Functions listed Below = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Below, 4) Network Function Accounts: i) A/c 0.0.55 - Update Address Book files (0.0.101/102) = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.), ii) A/c 0.0.56 - Update Fee schedule (0.0.111) = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.), iii) A/c 0.0.57 - Update Exchange Rate (0.0.112).

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.valid(append or update is)_2
member.summary: Fee Schedule Proto uploaded but not valid (append or update is required)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_79
member.summary: Fee Schedule Proto uploaded but not valid (append or update is required)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_80
member.summary: Fee Schedule Proto File Part uploaded

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_81
member.summary: The change on Exchange Rate exceeds ExchangeRateAllowedPercentage

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_82
member.summary: Contract permanent storage exceeded the currently allowable limit

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_83
member.summary: Transfer Account should not be same as Account to be deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_84
member.summary: The expiration date/time on a smart contract may not be reduced

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)
member.summary: Gas exceeded currently allowable gas limit per transaction

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_2
member.summary: File size exceeded the currently allowable limit

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_3
member.summary: When a valid signature is not provided for operations on account with receiverSigRequired=true

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_4
member.summary: The Topic ID specified is not in the system.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.authorized(ie - a deleteTopic for a topic with no)
member.summary: A provided admin key was invalid. Verify the bytes for an Ed25519 public key are exactly 32 bytes; and the bytes for a compressed ECDSA(secp256k1) key are exactly 33 Bytes = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Bytes, with the first byte either 0x02 or 0x03..

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.authorized(ie - a deleteTopic for a topic with no)_2
member.summary: A provided submit key was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_85
member.summary: An attempted operation was not authorized (ie - a deleteTopic for a topic with no adminKey).

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_86
member.summary: A ConsensusService message is empty.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.total(chunks)
member.summary: The autoRenewAccount specified is not a Valid = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Valid, active account.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.total(chunks)_2
member.summary: An adminKey was not specified on the Topic = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Topic, so there must not be an autoRenewAccount.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.total(chunks)_3
member.summary: The topic has Expired = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Expired, was not automatically Renewed = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Renewed, and is in a 7 day grace period before the topic will be deleted unrecoverably. This error response code will not be returned until autoRenew functionality is supported by HAPI.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_87
member.summary: chunk number must be from 1 to total (chunks) inclusive.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_88
member.summary: For every Chunk = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Chunk, the payer account that is part of initialTransactionID must match the Payer Account of this transaction. The entire initialTransactionID should match the transactionID of the first Chunk = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Chunk, but this is not checked or enforced by Hedera except when the chunk number is 1.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_89
member.summary: Account is frozen and cannot transact with the token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_90
member.summary: An involved account already has more than tokens.maxPerAccount associations with non-deleted tokens.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_91
member.summary: The token is invalid or does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_92
member.summary: Invalid token decimals

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_93
member.summary: Invalid token initial supply

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_94
member.summary: Treasury Account does not exist or is deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_95
member.summary: Token Symbol is not UTF-8 capitalized alphabetical string

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_96
member.summary: Freeze key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_97
member.summary: Amounts in transfer list are not net zero

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_98
member.summary: A token symbol was not provided

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_99
member.summary: The provided token symbol was too long

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_100
member.summary: KYC must be granted and account does not have KYC granted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_101
member.summary: KYC key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_102
member.summary: Token balance is not sufficient for the transaction

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_103
member.summary: Token transactions cannot be executed on deleted token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_104
member.summary: Supply key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_105
member.summary: Wipe key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_106
member.summary: The requested token mint amount would cause an invalid total supply

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_107
member.summary: The requested token burn amount would cause an invalid total supply

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_108
member.summary: A required token-account relationship is missing

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_109
member.summary: The target of a wipe operation was the token treasury account

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_110
member.summary: The provided KYC key was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_111
member.summary: The provided wipe key was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_112
member.summary: The provided freeze key was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_113
member.summary: The provided supply key was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_114
member.summary: Token Name is not provided

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_115
member.summary: Token Name is too long

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_116
member.summary: The provided wipe amount must not be Negative = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Negative, zero or bigger than the token holder balance

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_117
member.summary: Token does not have Admin key Set = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Set, thus update/delete transactions cannot be performed

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.transfers(both from and)
member.summary: An associateToken operation specified a token already associated to the account

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.transfers(both from and)_2
member.summary: An attempted operation is invalid until all token balances for the target account are zero

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.transfers(both from and)_3
member.summary: An attempted operation is invalid because the account is a treasury

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.transfers(both from and)_4
member.summary: Same TokenIDs present in the token list

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_118
member.summary: Exceeded the number of token transfers (both from and to) allowed for token transfer list

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_119
member.summary: TokenTransfersTransactionBody has no TokenTransferList

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_120
member.summary: TokenTransfersTransactionBody has a TokenTransferList with no AccountAmounts

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_121
member.summary: The Scheduled entity does not exist; or has now Expired = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Expired, been Deleted = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Deleted, or been executed

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_122
member.summary: The Scheduled entity cannot be modified. Admin key not set

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_123
member.summary: The provided Scheduled Payer does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_124
member.summary: The Schedule Create Transaction TransactionID account does not exist

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_125
member.summary: The provided sig map did not contain any new valid signatures from required signers of the scheduled transaction

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ScheduleCreate(that,all fields other than)
member.summary: The required signers for a scheduled transaction cannot be Resolved = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Resolved, for example because they do not exist or have been deleted

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ScheduleCreate(that,all fields other than)_2
member.summary: Only whitelisted transaction types may be scheduled

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ScheduleCreate(that,all fields other than)_3
member.summary: At least one of the signatures in the provided sig map did not represent a valid signature for any required signer

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ScheduleCreate(that,all fields other than)_4
member.summary: The scheduled field in the TransactionID may not be set to true

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_126
member.summary: A schedule already exists with the same identifying fields of an attempted ScheduleCreate (that Is = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Is, all fields other than scheduledPayerAccountId)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_127
member.summary: A string field in the transaction has a UTF-8 encoding with the prohibited zero byte

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_128
member.summary: A schedule being signed or deleted has already been deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_129
member.summary: A schedule being signed or deleted has already been executed

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_130
member.summary: ConsensusSubmitMessage request's message size is larger than allowed.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_131
member.summary: An operation was assigned to more than one throttle group in a given bucket

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_132
member.summary: The capacity needed to satisfy all opsPerSec groups in a bucket overflowed a signed 8-byte integral type

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_133
member.summary: Given the network size in the address Book = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Book, the node-level capacity for an operation would never be enough to accept a single request; usually means a bucket burstPeriod should be increased

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_134
member.summary: A bucket was defined without any throttle groups

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_135
member.summary: A throttle group was granted zero opsPerSec

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_136
member.summary: The throttle definitions file was Updated = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Updated, but some supported operations were not assigned a bucket

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_137
member.summary: The new contents for the throttle definitions system file were not valid protobuf

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_138
member.summary: The new throttle definitions system file were Invalid = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Invalid, and no more specific error could be divined

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_139
member.summary: The transaction references an account which has passed its expiration without renewal funds Available = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Available, and currently remains in the ledger only because of the grace period given to expired entities

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_140
member.summary: Invalid token max supply

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_141
member.summary: Invalid token nft serial number

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_142
member.summary: Invalid nft id

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_143
member.summary: Nft metadata is too long

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_144
member.summary: Repeated operations count exceeds the limit

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_145
member.summary: The range of data to be gathered is out of the set boundaries

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_146
member.summary: A custom fractional fee set a denominator of zero

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_147
member.summary: The transaction payer could not afford a custom fee

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_148
member.summary: More than 10 custom fees were specified

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_149
member.summary: Any of the feeCollector accounts for customFees is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_150
member.summary: Any of the token Ids in customFees is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_151
member.summary: Any of the token Ids in customFees are not associated to feeCollector

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_152
member.summary: A token cannot have more units minted due to its configured supply ceiling

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_153
member.summary: The transaction attempted to move an NFT serial number from an account other than its owner

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_154
member.summary: A custom fee schedule entry did not specify either a fixed or fractional fee

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_155
member.summary: Only positive fees may be assessed at this time

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_156
member.summary: Fee schedule key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_157
member.summary: A fractional custom fee exceeded the range of a 64-bit signed integer

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_158
member.summary: A royalty cannot exceed the total fungible value exchanged for an NFT

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_159
member.summary: Each fractional custom fee must have its MaximumAmount = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.MaximumAmount, if Specified = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Specified, at least its minimumAmount

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_160
member.summary: A fee schedule update tried to clear the custom fees from a token whose fee schedule was already empty

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_161
member.summary: Only tokens of type FUNGIBLECOMMON can be used to as fee schedule denominations

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_162
member.summary: Only tokens of type FUNGIBLECOMMON can have fractional fees

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_163
member.summary: The provided custom fee schedule key was invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_164
member.summary: The requested token mint metadata was invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_165
member.summary: The requested token burn metadata was invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_166
member.summary: The treasury for a unique token cannot be changed until it owns no NFTs

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_167
member.summary: An account cannot be dissociated from a unique token if it owns NFTs for the token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_168
member.summary: A NFT can only be burned when owned by the unique token's treasury

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_169
member.summary: An account did not own the NFT to be wiped

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_170
member.summary: An AccountAmount token transfers list referenced a token type other than FUNGIBLECOMMON

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_171
member.summary: All the NFTs allowed in the current price regime have already been minted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_172
member.summary: The payer account has been marked as deleted

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_173
member.summary: The reference chain of custom fees for a transferred token exceeded the maximum length of 2

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_174
member.summary: More than 20 balance adjustments were to satisfy a CryptoTransfer and its implied custom fee payments

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_175
member.summary: The sender account in the token transfer transaction could not afford a custom fee

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_176
member.summary: Currently no more than 4 = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.4,294 = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.294,967 = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.967,295 NFTs may be minted for a given unique token type

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_177
member.summary: Only tokens of type NONFUNGIBLEUNIQUE can have royalty fees

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_178
member.summary: The account has reached the limit on the automatic associations count.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_179
member.summary: Already existing automatic associations are more than the new maximum automatic associations.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_180
member.summary: Cannot set the number of automatic associations for an account more than the maximum allowed token associations tokens.maxPerAccount.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_181
member.summary: Token is paused. This Token cannot be a part of any kind of Transaction until unpaused.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_182
member.summary: Pause key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_183
member.summary: The provided pause key was invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_184
member.summary: The update file in a freeze transaction body must exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_185
member.summary: The hash of the update file in a freeze transaction body must match the in-memory hash.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.the(consensus)
member.summary: A FREEZEUPGRADE transaction was handled with no previous update prepared.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.the(consensus)_2
member.summary: A FREEZEABORT transaction was handled with no scheduled freeze.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.the(consensus)_3
member.summary: The update file hash when handling a FREEZEUPGRADE transaction differs from the file hash at the time of handling the PREPAREUPGRADE transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_186
member.summary: The given freeze start time was in the (consensus) past.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_187
member.summary: The prepared update file cannot be updated or appended until either the upgrade has been Completed = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Completed, or a FREEZEABORT has been handled.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_188
member.summary: Once a freeze is Scheduled = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Scheduled, it must be aborted before any other type of freeze can can be performed.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_189
member.summary: If an NMT upgrade has been Prepared = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Prepared, the following operation must be a FREEZEUPGRADE. (To issue a FreezeOnly = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.FreezeOnly, submit a FREEZEABORT first.)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_190
member.summary: If an NMT upgrade has been Prepared = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Prepared, the subsequent FREEZEUPGRADE transaction must confirm the id of the file to be used in the upgrade.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_191
member.summary: If an NMT upgrade has been Prepared = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Prepared, the subsequent FREEZEUPGRADE transaction must confirm the hash of the file to be used in the upgrade.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_5
member.summary: Consensus throttle did not allow execution of this transaction. System is throttled at consensus level.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_6
member.summary: A precompiled contract Succeeded = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Succeeded, but was later reverted.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_7
member.summary: All contract storage allocated to the current price regime has been consumed.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_192
member.summary: An alias used in a CryptoTransfer transaction is not the serialization of a primitive Key message--that Is = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Is, a Key with a single Ed25519 or ECDSA(secp256k1) public key and no unknown protobuf fields.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_193
member.summary: A fungible token transfer expected a different number of decimals than the involved type actually has.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_194
member.summary: The proxy account id is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_195
member.summary: The transfer account id in CryptoDelete transaction is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_196
member.summary: The fee collector account id in TokenFeeScheduleUpdate is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_197
member.summary: The alias already set on an account cannot be updated using CryptoUpdate transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_198
member.summary: An approved allowance specifies a spender account that is the same as the hbar/token owner account.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_199
member.summary: The establishment or adjustment of an approved allowance cause the token allowance to exceed the token maximum supply.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_200
member.summary: The specified amount for an approved allowance cannot be negative.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_201
member.summary: The approveForAll flag cannot be set for a fungible token.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_202
member.summary: The spender does not have an existing approved allowance with the hbar/token owner.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_203
member.summary: The transfer amount exceeds the current approved allowance for the spender account.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_204
member.summary: The payer account of an approveAllowances or adjustAllowance transaction is attempting to go beyond the maximum allowed number of allowances.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_205
member.summary: No allowances have been specified in the approval transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_206
member.summary: Spender is repeated more than once in Crypto or Token or NFT allowance lists in a single CryptoApproveAllowance transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_207
member.summary: Serial numbers are repeated in nft allowance for a single spender account

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_208
member.summary: Fungible common token used in NFT allowances

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_209
member.summary: Non fungible token used in fungible token allowances

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_210
member.summary: The account id specified as the owner is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_211
member.summary: The account id specified as the spender is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_212
member.summary: [Deprecated] If the CryptoDeleteAllowance transaction has repeated crypto or token or Nft allowances to delete.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_213
member.summary: If the account Id specified as the delegating spender is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_214
member.summary: The delegating Spender cannot grant approveForAll allowance on a NFT token type for another spender.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_215
member.summary: The delegating Spender cannot grant allowance on a NFT serial for another spender as it doesnt not have approveForAll granted on token-owner.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_216
member.summary: The scheduled transaction could not be created because it's expirationTime was too far in the future.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_217
member.summary: The scheduled transaction could not be created because it's expirationTime was less than or equal to the consensus time.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_218
member.summary: The scheduled transaction could not be created because it would cause throttles to be violated on the specified expirationTime.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_219
member.summary: The scheduled transaction could not be created because it would cause the gas limit to be violated on the specified expirationTime.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_220
member.summary: The ethereum transaction either failed parsing or failed signature Validation = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Validation, or some other EthereumTransaction error not covered by another response code.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_221
member.summary: EthereumTransaction was signed against a chainId that this network does not support.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_222
member.summary: This transaction specified an ethereumNonce that is not the current ethereumNonce of the account.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_223
member.summary: The ethereum transaction specified an access List = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.List, which the network does not support.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_224
member.summary: A schedule being signed or deleted has passed it's expiration date and is pending execution if needed and then expiration.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_225
member.summary: A selfdestruct or ContractDelete targeted a contract that is a token treasury.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_226
member.summary: A selfdestruct or ContractDelete targeted a contract with non-zero token balances.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_227
member.summary: A contract referenced by a transaction is "detached"; that Is = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Is, expired and lacking any hbar funds for auto-renewal payment---but still within its post-expiry grace period.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_228
member.summary: A ContractUpdate requested removal of a contract's auto-renew Account = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Account, but that contract has no auto-renew account.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_229
member.summary: A delete transaction submitted via HAPI set permanentRemoval=true

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_230
member.summary: A CryptoCreate or ContractCreate used the deprecated proxyAccountID field.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_231
member.summary: An account set the stakedAccountId to itself in CryptoUpdate or ContractUpdate transactions.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_232
member.summary: The staking account id or staking node id given is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(if)
member.summary: Native Staking = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Staking, while Implemented = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Implemented, has not yet enabled by the council.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(if)_2
member.summary: The range provided in UtilPrng transaction is negative.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(if)_3
member.summary: The maximum number of entities allowed in the current price regime have been created.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(if)_4
member.summary: The full prefix signature for precompile is not valid

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(if)_5
member.summary: The combined balances of a contract and its auto-renew account (if any) did not cover the rent charged for net new storage used in a transaction.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.account(if)_6
member.summary: A contract transaction tried to use more than the allowed number of child Records = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Records, via either system contract records or internal contract creations.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_233
member.summary: The combined balances of a contract and its auto-renew account (if any) or balance of an account did not cover the auto-renewal fees in a transaction.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_8
member.summary: A transaction's protobuf message includes unknown fields; could mean that a client expects not-yet-released functionality to be available.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_9
member.summary: The account cannot be modified. Account's key is not set

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.ECDSA(secp256k1)_10
member.summary: An alias that is assigned to an account or contract cannot be assigned to another account or contract.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_234
member.summary: A provided metadata key was invalid. Verification Includes = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Includes, for Example = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Example, checking the size of Ed25519 and ECDSA(secp256k1) public keys.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_235
member.summary: Metadata key is not set on token

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_236
member.summary: Token Metadata is not provided

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_237
member.summary: NFT serial numbers are missing in the TokenUpdateNftsTransactionBody

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_238
member.summary: Admin key is not set on token

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.name(DNS)
member.summary: A transaction failed because the consensus node identified is deleted from the address book.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.name(DNS)_2
member.summary: A transaction failed because the consensus node identified is not valid or does not exist in state.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_239
member.summary:
A transaction failed because one or more entries in the list of service endpoints for the `gossipEndpoint` field is invalid.
The most common cause for this response is a service endpoint that has the domain name (DNS) set rather than address and port.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.name(DNS)_3
member.summary:
A transaction failed because the node account identifier provided does not exist or is not valid.
One common source of this error is providing a node account identifier using the "alias" form rather than "numeric" form. It is also used for atomic batch transaction for child transaction if the node account id is not 0.0.0.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.name(DNS)_4
member.summary: A transaction failed because the description field cannot be encoded as UTF-8 or is more than 100 bytes when encoded.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_240
member.summary:
A transaction failed because one or more entries in the list of service endpoints for the `serviceEndpoint` field is invalid.
The most common cause for this response is a service endpoint that has the domain name (DNS) set rather than address and port.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_241
member.summary:
A transaction failed because the TLS certificate provided for the node is missing or invalid.

#### Probable Causes The certificate MUST be a TLS certificate of a type permitted for gossip signatures.
The value presented MUST be a UTF-8 NFKD encoding of the TLS certificate.
The certificate encoded MUST be in PEM format.
The `gossipCaCertificate` field is REQUIRED and MUST NOT be empty.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_242
member.summary:
A transaction failed because the hash provided for the gRPC certificate is present but invalid.

#### Probable Causes The `grpcCertificateHash` MUST be a SHA-384 hash.
The input hashed MUST be a UTF-8 NFKD encoding of the actual TLS certificate.
The certificate to be encoded MUST be in PEM format.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_243
member.summary:
The maximum automatic associations value is not valid.
The most common cause for this error is a value less than `-1`.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_244
member.summary: The maximum number of nodes allowed in the address book have been created.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_245
member.summary: In Serviceendpoint = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Serviceendpoint, domainName and ipAddressV4 are mutually exclusive

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_246
member.summary: Fully qualified domain name is not allowed in gossipEndpoint

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_247
member.summary: In Serviceendpoint = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Serviceendpoint, domainName size too large

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_248
member.summary: ServiceEndpoint is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_249
member.summary: The number of gossip endpoints exceeds the limit

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_250
member.summary:
The transaction attempted to use duplicate `TokenReference`.
This affects `TokenReject` attempting to reject same token reference more than once.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_251
member.summary: The account id specified as the owner in `TokenReject` is invalid or does not exist.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_252
member.summary: The transaction attempted to use more than the allowed number of `TokenReference`.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_253
member.summary: The number of service endpoints exceeds the limit

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_254
member.summary: The IPv4 address is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_255
member.summary: The transaction attempted to use empty `TokenReference` list.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_256
member.summary: The node account is not allowed to be updated

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_257
member.summary: The token has no metadata or supply key

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_258
member.summary: The list of `PendingAirdropId`s is empty and MUST NOT be empty.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.airdrop(s)
member.summary: A `PendingAirdropId` is repeated in a `claim` or `cancel` transaction.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.airdrop(s)_2
member.summary: The number of `PendingAirdropId` values in the list exceeds the maximum allowable number.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.airdrop(s)_3
member.summary: A pending airdrop already exists for the specified NFT.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_259
member.summary:
The identified account is sender for one or more pending airdrop(s) and cannot be deleted.

The requester SHOULD cancel all pending airdrops before resending this transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_260
member.summary:
Consensus throttle did not allow execution of this transaction.
The transaction should be retried after a modest delay.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_261
member.summary:
The provided pending airdrop id is invalid.
This pending airdrop MAY already be claimed or cancelled.

The client SHOULD query a mirror node to determine the current status of the pending airdrop.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_262
member.summary: The token to be airdropped has a fallback royalty fee and cannot be sent or claimed via an airdrop transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_263
member.summary:
This airdrop claim is for a pending airdrop with an invalid token.
The token might be Deleted = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Deleted, or the sender may not have enough tokens to fulfill the offer.

The client SHOULD query mirror node to determine the status of the pending airdrop and whether the sender can fulfill the offer.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_264
member.summary: A scheduled transaction configured to wait for expiry to execute was given an expiry time at which there is already too many transactions scheduled to expire; its creation must be retried with a different expiry.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.times(is /// approximately four million times with typical network configuration.)
member.summary: The provided gRPC certificate hash is invalid.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.times(is /// approximately four million times with typical network configuration.)_2
member.summary: A scheduled transaction configured to wait for expiry to execute was not given an explicit expiration time.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.times(is /// approximately four million times with typical network configuration.)_3
member.summary: A contract operation attempted to schedule another transaction after it had already scheduled a recursive contract call.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_265
member.summary: A contract can schedule recursive calls a finite number of times (this is approximately four million times with typical network configuration.)

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_266
member.summary: The target network is waiting for the ledger ID to be Set = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Set, which is a side effect of finishing the network's TSS construction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_267
member.summary: The provided fee exempt key list size exceeded the limit.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_268
member.summary: The provided fee exempt key list contains duplicated keys.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_269
member.summary: The provided fee exempt key list contains an invalid key.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_270
member.summary: The provided fee schedule key contains an invalid key.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_271
member.summary: If a fee schedule key is not set when we create a topic we cannot add it on update.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_272
member.summary: If the topic's custom fees are updated the topic SHOULD have a fee schedule key

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_273
member.summary: The fee amount is exceeding the amount that the payer is willing to pay.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_274
member.summary: There are no corresponding custom fees.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_275
member.summary: The provided list contains invalid max custom fee.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_276
member.summary: The provided max custom fee list contains fees with duplicate denominations.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_277
member.summary: The provided max custom fee list contains fees with duplicate account id.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_278
member.summary: Max custom fees list is not supported for this operation.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_279
member.summary: The list of batch transactions is empty

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_280
member.summary: The list of batch transactions contains duplicated transactions

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_281
member.summary: The list of batch transactions contains a transaction type that is in the AtomicBatch blacklist as configured in the network.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_282
member.summary: The inner transaction of a batch transaction failed

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_283
member.summary: The inner transaction of a batch transaction is missing a batch key

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_284
member.summary: The batch key is set for a non batch transaction

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_285
member.summary: The batch key is not valid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_286
member.summary: The provided schedule expiry time is not configurable.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_287
member.summary: The network just started at genesis and is creating system entities.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_288
member.summary: The least common multiple of the throttle group's milliOpsPerSec is too large and it's overflowing.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_289
member.summary: Token airdrop transactions can not contain multiple senders for a single token.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_290
member.summary: The GRPC proxy endpoint is set in the NodeCreate or NodeUpdate Transaction = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Transaction, which the network does not support.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_291
member.summary: An NFT transfers list referenced a token type other than NONFUNGIBLEUNIQUE.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_292
member.summary: A HAPI client cannot set the SignedTransaction#useSerializedTxMessageHashAlgorithm field.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_293
member.summary: An EVM hook execution was throttled due to high network gas utilization.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_294
member.summary: A user tried to create a hook with an id already in use.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_295
member.summary: A transaction tried to execute a hook that did not match the specified type or was malformed in some other way.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.representation(i.e.,no leading)
member.summary: A CryptoTransfer relying on a ACCOUNTALLOWANCE hook was rejected.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.representation(i.e.,no leading)_2
member.summary: A hook id was not found.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.representation(i.e.,no leading)_3
member.summary: A lambda mapping Slot = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Slot, storage Key = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Key, or storage value exceeded 32 bytes.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_296
member.summary: A lambda mapping Slot = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Slot, storage Key = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Key, or storage value failed to use the minimal representation (i.e. = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.., no leading zeros).

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_297
member.summary: A hook id was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_298
member.summary: A lambda storage update had no contents.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_299
member.summary: A user repeated the same hook id in a creation details list.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_300
member.summary: Hooks are not not enabled on the target Hiero network.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.representation(i.e.,no leading)_4
member.summary: The target hook is not a lambda.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.representation(i.e.,no leading)_5
member.summary: A hook was deleted.

member.name: M:ResponseStatus.representation(i.e.,no leading)_6
member.summary: The LambdaSStore tried to update too many storage slots in a single transaction.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_301
member.summary: A lambda mapping Slot = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Slot, storage Key = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Key, or storage value failed to use the minimal representation (i.e. = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.., no leading zeros).

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_302
member.summary: A lambda mapping Slot = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Slot, storage Key = Proto.ResponseCodeEnum.Key, or storage value exceeded 32 bytes.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_303
member.summary: A hook creation spec was not found.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_304
member.summary: A hook extension point was empty.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_305
member.summary: A hook admin key was invalid.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_306
member.summary: The hook deletion requires the hook to have zero storage slots.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_307
member.summary: Cannot set both a hook call and an approval on the same AccountAmount or NftTransfer message.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_308
member.summary: The attempted operation is invalid until all the target entity's hooks have been deleted.

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_309
member.summary: The HookCall set in the transaction is invalid

member.name: T:ResponseStatus_310
member.summary: Hooks are not supported to be used in TokenAirdrop transactions
